---
title: "Module 2: Point Estimation"
subtitle: "Statistical Estimation for Data Science and AI"
---

## Expectation & its Properties {#sec-expectation-and-properties-of-expectation}

### Video

::: {.column-margin}
{{< video 01_expectation-and-properties-of-expectation.mp4 >}}

[transcript](01_expectation-and-properties-of-expectation.en.txt){target="_blank"}
:::

### Handout

[Handout](02_video-slides-for-expectation-and-properties-of-expectation_module1_lesson4.pdf){width=700 height=700}

### Quiz (Graded)

{{< include ../_probability-expectation-and-variance.qmd >}}

### Reflection
